recommendations.title: Kokowääh 2
recommendations.overview: Who said a patchwork family is without problems? Two years after the turbulence of Kokowääh, everyday life turns to everyday chaos…

recommendations.title: 1½ Ritter - Auf der Suche nach der hinreißenden Herzelinde
recommendations.overview: The story of Lanze who is in love with the princess. One day the princess is kidnapped by the Dark Knight and Lanze starts his journey to rescue her. But he is not alone because Erdal, a turk, joins him on his journey.
recommendations.director: Christof Wahl, Torsten Künstler, Til Schweiger

recommendations.title: What a Man
recommendations.overview: What a man is a comedy that tells the story of a young professor, Alex (Matthias Schweighofer), who after being left by his girlfriend Caroline (Mavie Hörbiger), begins a journey to know himself. But how do you overcome the difficulties of a man toda

recommendations.title: Break Up Man
recommendations.overview: BREAK UP MAN is an odd couple road movie and tells the story of Henri, who works for a break up agency in Berlin and on behalf of those who want to separate themselves from their future “ex”-partners. To complete his most important mission he is conf

recommendations.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
recommendations.overview: An American Ambassador is killed during an attack at a U.S. compound in Libya as a security team struggles to make sense out of the chaos.

recommendations.title: Tod@s Caen
recommendations.overview: A pair of seducers try to prove who has the best techniques while trying not to fall in love with each other.

recommendations.title: Kaithi
recommendations.overview: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: Three people from different walks of life find themselves trapped inside a stalled elevator. What at first seems like an inconvenience rapidly escalates into a nightmare.

recommendations.title: Samurai II: Duel at Ichijoji Temple

recommendations.title: Little Manhattan
